spice_netlist:
* SKY130A three-output inverter fixture for candidate validation
.lib "sky130.lib.spice" tt
VDD vdd 0 DC 1.8
VIN1 in1 0 PULSE(0 1.8 0 20p 20p 0.8n 1.6n)
VIN2 in2 0 PULSE(0 1.8 0.45n 20p 20p 0.8n 1.6n)
VIN3 in3 0 PULSE(0 1.8 0.90n 20p 20p 0.8n 1.6n)
XM1 n1 in1 0 0 sky130_fd_pr__nfet_01v8 W=1.0 L=0.15
XM2 n1 in1 vdd vdd sky130_fd_pr__pfet_01v8 W=2.0 L=0.15
XM3 n2 in2 0 0 sky130_fd_pr__nfet_01v8 W=1.0 L=0.15
XM4 n2 in2 vdd vdd sky130_fd_pr__pfet_01v8 W=2.0 L=0.15
XM5 n3 in3 0 0 sky130_fd_pr__nfet_01v8 W=1.0 L=0.15
XM6 n3 in3 vdd vdd sky130_fd_pr__pfet_01v8 W=2.0 L=0.15
CLOAD n3 0 5f
.tran 20p 4n
.end
testbench_spice:
* SKY130A three-output inverter fixture for candidate validation
.lib "sky130.lib.spice" tt
VDD vdd 0 DC 1.8
VIN1 in1 0 PULSE(0 1.8 0 20p 20p 0.8n 1.6n)
VIN2 in2 0 PULSE(0 1.8 0.45n 20p 20p 0.8n 1.6n)
VIN3 in3 0 PULSE(0 1.8 0.90n 20p 20p 0.8n 1.6n)
XM1 n1 in1 0 0 sky130_fd_pr__nfet_01v8 W=1.0 L=0.15
XM2 n1 in1 vdd vdd sky130_fd_pr__pfet_01v8 W=2.0 L=0.15
XM3 n2 in2 0 0 sky130_fd_pr__nfet_01v8 W=1.0 L=0.15
XM4 n2 in2 vdd vdd sky130_fd_pr__pfet_01v8 W=2.0 L=0.15
XM5 n3 in3 0 0 sky130_fd_pr__nfet_01v8 W=1.0 L=0.15
XM6 n3 in3 vdd vdd sky130_fd_pr__pfet_01v8 W=2.0 L=0.15
CLOAD n3 0 5f
.tran 20p 4n
.end
